case_title: DANIELLE RHODES VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARLEEN GREEN (CLAIMS ADJUSTER) APPEARING ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RHODES, DANIELLE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2025 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RHODES, DANIELLE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2024 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO MAR-14-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE: BRADEN WOODS IS DOUBLE DUTY ON THIS DAY AND SIMULTANEOUSLY HEARING CASES FOR DEPT. 506 AND 608. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA NOT REPORTED (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. PLAINTIFF DANIELLE RHODES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARLEEN GREEN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RHODES, DANIELLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PURSUANT TO VC 22517, THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
